title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–15 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Bartolomeo, Cavendish, Don Chinjao, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #2 as the Colosseum battle intensifies as Bartolomeo’s strange power and cruel reputation become impossible to ignore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: That guy, ever seen him?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The one with the skull mark on his cape

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Even though he's so strong, no, I can't recall ever seeing him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: ...Wait. That is to say...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I feel like... I saw him long ago... that fighting style, without a shield...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: his name ...what was it now....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Just look at him....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What's he doing!! Does he want to die!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why's no one laying a finger on him !!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I wish he'd hurry up and lose already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hehaha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Partici- pants' viewing area

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: The way he mocks people, it's like he's eating away at them....

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: That's why they call him "Bartolomeo the cannibal"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...he's also one of the cheeky kids who rose to fame after me....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All sorts of people are here, huh... pretty ex- citing, shishishi !!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey, what was your name again?

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: I'm Cavendish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What have you got there, cabbage?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just checking on my bounty posters of the worst generation

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If I don't get new ones, pretty soon I won't be able to even see the faces on these due to all the knife marks

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Couldn't you get over it? Why not just forgive them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, I can't. I'm going to kill them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: At a tournament with this sort of prize...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I thought at least one of them might appear...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But there's definitely a chance that they'd be hiding their face, like burgers was earlier

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If they are, I just have to wait for them to be among the survivors, and then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hiyahaya so this is where we watch from... We sure can see the match well from here

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: Hiya... by the way, how is GARP- San doing...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Strawhat Luffy-Kun ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eh? ...Do you know my gramps, old man?

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: A long time ago, GARP-San nearly killed me...

dialogue.speaker: Don Chinjao
dialogue.text: I've decided to hold that grudge against even his descendants

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What!?

summary: Pages 13–15 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
